audit_items.proof_trace: Function assumes tree structure but doesn't validate against shared references. When JSON contains shared json_value objects, the same object gets processed multiple times, causing line 960 `value->type` to dereference freed memory after the shared object was freed in a previous iteration.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides JSON with shared references (e.g., array elements pointing to same object). First traversal frees the shared object, second traversal accesses freed memory.
